name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.21.1 - AUTO-HANDOFF BELT-AND-SUSPENDERS. Extends v4.21.0 PreCompact hook with a second capture layer: in addition to emitting a system-reminder telling Claude to invoke the codi-handoff skill (Layer 1 RECOMMEND), the hook also writes a structured deterministic packet to ~/.codialectic/precompact-packet-<timestamp>.json containing timestamp, trigger, cwd, git state (branch + uncommitted files + recent commits + HEAD subject), session_id, and transcript_path (Layer 2 CAPTURE). Even if Claude ignores the reminder or compaction completes before Claude can act, the structural floor is preserved. Next session's waky-waky can find the packet via the latest-only marker at ~/.codialectic/last-precompact.json. Together: deterministic floor + conversational ceiling.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
